name: Koko Head Cafe
tagline: Lee Anne Wong's brunch spot — Cornflake French Toast and kimchi fried rice are mandatory.
mustOrder: Cornflake French Toast ($16–18, battered in cornflake cereal — cult following)
parking: Park on Kaimuki side streets (12th Ave, Harding Ave)
talkStory: Opened in 2014 by Chef Lee Anne Wong — Top Chef Season 1 alum and multiple James Beard nominee — who left New York's fine dining world to build a life in Hawaii. The Cornflake French Toast (battered in crushed cereal) has a cult following, and the breakfast bibimbap fuses Korean and local flavors perfectly. Wong also opened Papa Kurt's smash burger spot nearby. No reservations — walk-in waitlist only. The move: weekday mornings right at 7am opening for zero wait, then walk Waialae Ave for Kaimuki's boutiques.
